name: Orion
visual_description: a 30 year old man with a long beard. He is contemplative and a professional

name: The protagonist
visual_description: a clean-cut 40 year old nerdy man with glasses

name: Compaq portable
visual_description: 1983 portable computer, beige luggage-style case with built-in 9-inch amber monitor, full-sized keyboard that attaches to front as lid, weighing 30 pounds with carrying handle

name: AMC Eagle
visual_description: early 1980s four-wheel-drive station wagon, boxy sedan-like body with raised suspension, likely rust or tan colored

name: RadioShack store
visual_description: 1980s electronics retail store interior, wood-tone display fixtures, walls lined with electronic components in blister packs

visual_description: early business software running on CRT monitor, likely displaying spreadsheet or data entry interface

name: Tandy CoCo 2
visual_description: TRS-80 Color Computer 2, silver and black all-in-one home computer with integrated keyboard, 1980s 8-bit microcomputer

name: demonstration table
visual_description: folding table set up in mall corridor with computer equipment for public trials

name: mechanical mouse
visual_description: early 1980s computer mouse, beige plastic with ball mechanism and attached cord

visual_description: typical 1980s indoor shopping center flooring, square terrazzo or ceramic tiles in neutral tones

name: The office
visual_description: an implied indoor workspace where the team typically tests software and where they return at the end of the day.

name: Sunnyvale Town Center Mall
visual_description: a bustling indoor shopping center filled with a diverse crowd of varying ages and backgrounds, featuring tile floors where children run.

name: RadioShack

name: The AMC Eagle
